story.iWant: to validate that all Epic 3 components work together seamlessly through comprehensive integration testing
story.soThat: we can deploy with confidence knowing the reactive controller, web control server, and environment detection features integrate properly without breaking existing functionality

subtasks.subtask: Create tests/integration/test_epic3_e2e.py test file
Implement test_web_to_reactive_controller_e2e() - Web UI → Reactive detour → Success
Implement test_environment_detection_integration() - Sensor data → Environment detection → RAG filter → Plan
Implement test_full_workflow_indoor() - Indoor mission with reactive events
Implement test_full_workflow_outdoor() - Outdoor mission with GPS navigation
Implement test_concurrent_missions() - Multiple sequential missions with isolation verification
Implement test_reactive_log_visualization() - WebSocket real-time reactive event broadcasting
Implement test_ollama_moderate_detour_e2e() - MODERATE level detour execution
Implement test_critical_emergency_stop_e2e() - CRITICAL level emergency stop + replanning
Implement test_mission_success_with_multiple_detours() - Multiple reactive interventions
Implement test_environment_change_between_missions() - Different environments across missions
Add comprehensive test fixtures and mock data
Create tests/performance/test_load_testing.py test file
Implement test_concurrent_web_requests() - 10 simultaneous WebSocket connections
Implement test_websocket_message_throughput() - 100+ messages stability test
Implement test_ollama_concurrent_inference() - Simulate multiple reactive calls
Add response time assertions (<5 seconds for all requests)
Measure and log performance metrics (latency, throughput, error rate)
Generate performance test report with metrics visualization

task.title: Error Handling and Graceful Degradation Tests (AC: #3)

subtasks.subtask: Create tests/integration/test_error_handling.py test file
Implement test_ollama_failure_graceful_degradation() - Ollama service stop, verify rules-only fallback
Implement test_websocket_disconnect_reconnect() - Client disconnect, verify auto-reconnect
Implement test_network_error_handling() - Simulate network errors, verify error responses
Implement test_webots_simulator_error_recovery() - Simulate Webots crash, verify cleanup
Test timeout handling (Ollama >1500ms timeout)
Test reactive cache corruption recovery
Test environment misclassification handling (low confidence scenarios)
Execute full Epic 1-2 test suite (pytest tests/ -v --cov=src)
Verify all 270+ tests pass (100% pass rate required)
Generate HTML coverage report (htmlcov/index.html)
Verify test coverage remains >80% (check coverage report)
Identify and fix any test failures or regressions
Document any backward compatibility issues found
Verify no Epic 3 changes impact existing Epic 1-2 functionality
Create docs/test_plan_epic3.md - comprehensive test plan
Document all 10+ E2E test scenarios with inputs/expected outputs
Document performance test scenarios and acceptance criteria
Document error handling test scenarios
Create docs/integration_test_report.md - test results report
Include test execution summary (pass/fail counts, coverage, duration)
Document any bugs discovered with severity and status
Add test environment setup instructions
Include troubleshooting section for common test failures

criterion.title: End-to-End Integration Tests
criterion.description: Full workflow testing: Web UI → FastAPI WebSocket → Orchestrator → Reactive Controller → Environment Detection. Natural language command → real-time obstacle avoidance → environment recognition → mission success scenarios. Minimum 10 integration scenarios covering different combinations of Epic 3 features. All scenarios must pass (100% success rate).

criterion.title: Performance Validation (Load Testing)
criterion.description: Handle 10 concurrent web requests without degradation. WebSocket connection stability verified (100+ messages per connection). Ollama concurrent inference load testing (multiple reactive decisions). Response time <5 seconds for all requests (meets SLA).

criterion.title: Error Propagation Testing (Graceful Degradation)
criterion.description: Ollama service failure → verify graceful degradation to rules-only reactive mode. WebSocket disconnect → verify auto-reconnect functionality (3 retry attempts). Network errors → verify error handling and appropriate error responses. Webots simulator errors → verify cleanup and recovery procedures.

criterion.title: Regression Testing (Backward Compatibility)
criterion.description: Re-run all 270+ Epic 1-2 tests to ensure no functionality broken. Verify existing features work normally (no regressions). Confirm new features don't impact old code negatively. Maintain test coverage >80% across entire codebase.

criterion.title: Integration Test Documentation
criterion.description: Create comprehensive test plan document (test_plan_epic3.md). Document all test scenarios with expected outcomes. Generate test results report (integration_test_report.md). Track and document any bugs discovered during testing.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Story 3.5 provides 5 acceptance criteria: (1) E2E integration tests validating full workflow across 10+ scenarios, (2) Performance validation with 10 concurrent requests and response times <5s, (3) Error propagation tests for graceful degradation, (4) Regression testing of 270+ Epic 1-2 tests maintaining >80% coverage, (5) Integration test documentation including test plan and results report.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Epic 3 testing follows a risk-based, layered approach with emphasis on backward compatibility and performance validation. Test pyramid: E2E tests (10+ scenarios) → Integration tests (~20 tests) → Unit tests (~40 tests) + Regression tests (270+ existing). Expected total: ~345 tests (270 regression + 75 new). Target coverage >80%.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Test files to create: tests/integration/test_epic3_e2e.py (~500 lines, 10+ E2E scenarios), tests/performance/test_load_testing.py (~200 lines, load tests), tests/integration/test_error_handling.py (~300 lines, error handling scenarios). Documentation: docs/test_plan_epic3.md, docs/integration_test_report.md.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown and Story Details
doc.snippet: Story 3.5 validates Epic 3 components integration through comprehensive testing. Includes 10+ E2E scenarios (web to reactive, environment detection, indoor/outdoor missions), load testing (10 concurrent requests), error handling (Ollama failure, WebSocket disconnects), and regression testing (270+ Epic 1-2 tests). Estimated effort: 4 hours.

doc.title: LLM_ROBOT_2 Architecture
doc.snippet: Test framework: pytest with coverage plugin. Test categories: (1) Unit Tests - individual component testing with mocks, (2) Integration Tests - multi-component interaction testing, (3) E2E Tests - full workflow testing from user input to mission completion, (4) Performance Tests - load testing and benchmark validation, (5) Regression Tests - backward compatibility verification.

doc.title: Story 3.3: Environment-Aware Planning
doc.section: Learnings from Previous Story - Integration Test Insights
doc.snippet: Key integration testing lessons: (1) Test fixtures must match actual constructor signatures (RobotKnowledgeBase fixture issues), (2) Database state management - ChromaDB test database needed cleanup for fresh population, (3) Metadata consistency - environment metadata needed in both data files and population logic. Integration test patterns: fixture-based setup with dependency injection, mock sensor data for controlled scenarios, ChromaDB test database isolation.

artifact.reason: Pytest configuration with test discovery settings, output options, test markers (slow, last), and async test support. Defines testpaths, python_files/classes/functions patterns, and asyncio_mode=auto for CrewAI async agents.
Pytest configuration file that automatically loads .env file for all tests, verifying OPENAI_API_KEY is loaded. Provides project-wide test fixtures and setup.

Integration tests for Story 3.1 Hybrid Reactive Controller. Tests ActorAgent + HybridReactiveController integration, reactive log propagation, Verifier tolerance adjustment. Pattern to reuse for E2E tests.

Integration tests for Story 3.3 Environment-Aware Planning. Tests PlannerAgent with environment detection, ChromaDB where filter, environment-specific constraint retrieval. 10/10 tests passing after fixture corrections.
Integration tests for Orchestrator + RobotKnowledgeBase auto-initialization. 6/6 tests passing. Validates production integration with auto-populate feature. Critical pattern for E2E tests.

Integration tests for Story 3.2 FastAPI Web Control Server. Tests WebSocket connections, mission execution via web requests, status broadcasting. Pattern to reuse for load testing and WebSocket stability tests.
Unit tests for EnvironmentDetector (Story 3.3). 18/18 tests passing. Tests 4 environment scenarios + unknown case. Mock sensor data patterns can be reused for E2E tests.

python.package: Async test support for CrewAI agents and FastAPI
HTML test reports and evaluation reports

constraint.title: Test-Only Story
constraint.description: No production code changes allowed. All code implementation completed in Stories 3.0-3.3. Focus exclusively on test creation and validation.

constraint.title: Regression Testing Required
constraint.description: All 270+ Epic 1-2 tests must continue passing (100% pass rate). Any test failures must be investigated and resolved before story completion.

constraint.title: Test Coverage Maintenance
constraint.description: Overall test coverage must remain >80%. Verify coverage using pytest --cov=src --cov-report=html. Review htmlcov/index.html for coverage details.

constraint.title: E2E Test Coverage
constraint.description: Minimum 10 E2E integration scenarios required, covering: (1) Web → Reactive → Success, (2) Environment detection integration, (3) Indoor/Outdoor missions, (4) Concurrent missions, (5) Reactive log visualization, (6-10) Additional reactive and environment scenarios.

constraint.title: Performance Targets
constraint.description: Load tests must validate: (1) 10 concurrent WebSocket connections stable, (2) Response times <5 seconds for all requests, (3) WebSocket message throughput >100 messages without errors, (4) Ollama concurrent inference handles multiple reactive calls.

constraint.title: Error Handling Validation
constraint.description: Error tests must verify graceful degradation: (1) Ollama service failure → rules-only fallback, (2) WebSocket disconnect → auto-reconnect (3 retries), (3) Network errors → appropriate error responses, (4) Webots errors → cleanup and recovery.

constraint.title: Test Documentation Required
constraint.description: Must create: (1) docs/test_plan_epic3.md with all test scenarios documented, (2) docs/integration_test_report.md with test execution results, pass/fail counts, coverage metrics, and any bugs discovered.

constraint.title: Test Execution Environment
constraint.description: Tests require: (1) Python 3.11+ with all dependencies, (2) Webots R2025a running, (3) Ollama service with tinyllama model, (4) FastAPI server on port 8000, (5) 8GB RAM, 4 CPU cores minimum.

interface.name: Pytest Fixtures
WebSocket Test Client Pattern
interface.signature: async def test_websocket_connection(): """ Pattern for testing WebSocket connections to FastAPI server. Establishes connection, sends requests, verifies responses. """ async with websockets.connect("ws://localhost:8000/ws/control") as websocket: # Send mission request await websocket.send(json.dumps(mission_request)) # Receive response response = await websocket.recv() # Verify response assert response["success"] == True

interface.name: E2E Test Structure
interface.signature:
def test_full_e2e_workflow(): """ E2E test structure pattern: 1. Setup: Initialize components (Orchestrator, WebSocket, etc.) 2. Execute: Run full mission workflow 3. Verify: Check all acceptance criteria met 4. Teardown: Cleanup resources """ # Setup orchestrator = setup_orchestrator_with_reactive()
# Execute result = orchestrator.execute_mission(mission_command)
# Verify assert result.success == True assert result.reactive_events > 0
# Teardown cleanup_resources()

standards.paragraph: Testing follows pytest framework with conftest.py fixtures for project-wide setup. Test organization: tests/unit/ for component tests, tests/integration/ for multi-component tests, tests/performance/ for load/benchmark tests. Coverage reporting via pytest-cov with >80% target. Async test support via pytest-asyncio for CrewAI agents and FastAPI. Test markers: @pytest.mark.slow for long-running tests, @pytest.mark.last for evaluation summaries. All tests auto-discover via test_*.py pattern. Environment setup via conftest.py loads .env for OPENAI_API_KEY. Integration tests use fixtures for RobotKnowledgeBase, mock sensor data, and WebSocket clients. E2E tests validate full workflows from user input to mission completion with reactive interventions and environment detection.

idea.title: E2E: Web to Reactive Controller
idea.description: Test full workflow: WebSocket → FastAPI → Orchestrator → Reactive Controller → Success. Send natural language command "장애물 회피하며 5미터 전진", verify reactive intervention when obstacle detected, verify mission success with reactive log.

idea.title: E2E: Environment Detection Integration
idea.description: Test environment detection + RAG filtering: Inject indoor sensor data (GPS=0.2, Lidar=2m), verify EnvironmentDetector classifies as "indoor", verify Planner retrieves only indoor constraints, verify mission adapts to indoor environment.

idea.title: E2E: Indoor Mission with Reactive
idea.description: Test indoor mission: GPS unavailable, Lidar-based navigation, reactive controller handles obstacles, mission completes successfully. Verify environment="indoor" and reactive_log populated.

idea.title: E2E: Outdoor Mission with GPS
idea.description: Test outdoor mission: GPS-based navigation, reactive controller minimal interventions (open space), mission completes successfully. Verify environment="outdoor".

idea.title: E2E: Concurrent Missions Isolation
idea.description: Test 3 sequential missions with different environments (indoor, outdoor, warehouse). Verify isolation: each mission uses correct environment constraints, reactive logs don't cross-contaminate, state properly reset between missions.

idea.title: E2E: Reactive Log WebSocket Broadcast
idea.description: Test real-time reactive event broadcasting: Connect WebSocket client, start mission with obstacles, verify reactive events broadcast to client in real-time, verify client receives reactive_log updates.

idea.title: E2E: Ollama MODERATE Detour
idea.description: Test MODERATE level reactive decision: Obstacle at 0.3m distance, verify Ollama called for detour plan, verify detour executed (3-step: rotate, move, rotate), verify mission continues after detour, verify reactive_log records MODERATE intervention.

idea.title: E2E: CRITICAL Emergency Stop
idea.description: Test CRITICAL level reactive decision: Obstacle at 0.1m distance, verify immediate emergency stop (<1ms), verify mission fails and returns to Planner for replanning, verify reactive_log records CRITICAL intervention.

idea.title: E2E: Multiple Detours in One Mission
idea.description: Test mission with 3+ reactive interventions: Multiple obstacles at varying distances, verify multiple detours executed, verify mission still succeeds, verify Verifier adjusts tolerance based on reactive_log (0.1m → 0.3m).

idea.title: E2E: Environment Change Between Missions
idea.description: Test environment adaptation: Mission 1 indoor (GPS weak), Mission 2 outdoor (GPS strong), verify environment detector adapts, verify different RAG constraints used, verify both missions succeed with appropriate strategies.

idea.title: Load: 10 Concurrent WebSocket Connections
idea.description: Performance test: Create 10 WebSocket clients in parallel, send 10 different mission commands simultaneously, verify all processed without errors, verify all response times <5 seconds, verify no interference between concurrent missions.

idea.title: Load: WebSocket Message Throughput
idea.description: Stability test: Single WebSocket connection, send 100+ status update requests, verify all messages processed, verify no connection drops, verify message order preserved, verify average latency <50ms.

idea.title: Load: Ollama Concurrent Inference
idea.description: Performance test: Simulate 5 reactive decisions simultaneously (multiple missions with MODERATE obstacles), verify Ollama handles concurrent requests, verify all responses <1200ms P90, verify cache hit rate >70%.

idea.title: Error: Ollama Service Failure
idea.description: Graceful degradation test: Start mission with Ollama running, stop Ollama service mid-mission, verify reactive controller detects unavailability, verify fallback to rules-only mode (CRITICAL emergency stop or NORMAL continue), verify mission does not crash.

idea.title: Error: WebSocket Disconnect and Reconnect
idea.description: Reconnection test: Establish WebSocket connection, start mission, disconnect client mid-mission, verify server continues mission, verify client auto-reconnects (3 retry attempts), verify status updates resume after reconnect.

idea.title: Error: Network Error Handling
idea.description: Error response test: Simulate network timeout to FastAPI server, verify appropriate error response (503 Service Unavailable), simulate invalid JSON request, verify 400 Bad Request error, verify error messages clear and actionable.

idea.title: Error: Webots Simulator Error Recovery
idea.description: Recovery test: Simulate Webots crash (process kill), verify Orchestrator detects error, verify cleanup procedures execute (close connections, release resources), verify error logged with context.

idea.title: Regression: Execute Full Epic 1-2 Test Suite
idea.description: Backward compatibility test: Run pytest tests/ -v --cov=src, verify all 270+ tests pass (100% pass rate), verify test execution time reasonable (<10 minutes), generate HTML coverage report, verify coverage >80%.

idea.title: Regression: Verify Existing Functionality
idea.description: Spot-check critical Epic 1-2 features: Planner generates action plans, Actor executes actions, Verifier validates results, RAG retrieves constraints, Safety Validator checks collisions, Failure Recovery triggers replanning. Verify no degradation from Epic 3 changes.

idea.title: Documentation: Test Plan Creation
idea.description: Create docs/test_plan_epic3.md: Document all 10+ E2E scenarios with inputs/expected outputs/pass criteria, document performance test scenarios with acceptance thresholds, document error handling scenarios, add test environment setup instructions.

idea.title: Documentation: Test Results Report
idea.description: Create docs/integration_test_report.md after test execution: Include test execution summary (pass/fail counts, duration), coverage metrics (overall and per-module), performance metrics (latency, throughput), bugs discovered with severity/status, recommendations for improvements.
